title: Jewel
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Jewel}}
The '''Jewel''' was formerly a luxury [[Hotel/Legends|hotel]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] that became the headquarters for the [[Desilijic/Legends|Desilijic]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]] there.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]''
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]''
